title: Till Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub Till(Condition As String) As Boolean
parameters: Condition	Specifies the I/O condition. For details see the Till Statement in the SPEL+ Language Reference manual.
description: Sets the condition used for motion commands that specify Till.
see_also:
Go

Jump

JS

Sense

TillOn

Till Example

VB Example:

With m_spel

   .Till("Sw(1) = On")

   Go("P1 TILL")

End With

C# Example:

m_spel.Till("Sw(1) = On");

m_spel.Go("P1 TILL");
examples:
With m_spel
   .Till("Sw(1) = On")
   Go("P1 TILL")
End With
